front.title: A YANG Data Model for Collection Measurement

abstract.t: This document specifies a YANG data model for Collection Measurement based on the Performance Management (PM) Collection function requirements defined in ITU-T G.7710. The model processes raw performance data sampled at a network node and produces structured data that can be retrieved by clients via pull-based mechanisms or delivered via push-based mechanisms such as YANG-Push. This document does not define new performance metrics; the base metrics are those of the IPPM framework, and the model specifies the collection and exposure of the operationally important subset identified by ITU-T G.7710.
